html:
2026-0271
2026-03-25GACSpecial Economic Measures ActRegulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations in order to add one hundred (100) vessels to the Schedule 1.1 of the Regulations that are part of the shadow fleet which will facilitate the transport of oil, liquefied natural gas, arms, and other sanctioned goods on behalf of or for the benefit of Russia or a person in Russia.Registration: SOR/2026-0061 Publication Date: 2026-04-08
subject: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations in order to add one hundred (100) vessels to the Schedule 1.1 of the Regulations that are part of the shadow fleet which will facilitate the transport of oil, liquefied natural gas, arms, and other sanctioned goods on behalf of or for the benefit of Russia or a person in Russia.
